listeners.purpose: Refuses the Branch close when any team referencing it still has status='active'. Fires a domain-level refusal event; the branch module surfaces the error as `BRANCH_HAS_ACTIVE_TEAMS` (409). Distinct from the FK CASCADE — we intentionally block, not cascade, because team archive is a deliberate ops decision.

Cascades: finds every team_member with team_id = event.team_id AND status='active', transitions each to status='inactive' + left_reason='team_archived'. Fires TeamMemberLeft per member with cascade_trigger='team_archived'. Runs at priority 50 (before notification-tier listeners) so the notification fan-out sees the inactive state.
Dispatches ConvertConfirmedTrialsJob to run the atomic conversion. The listener runs FIRST (priority 40) because everything else on the event fan-out assumes the conversion has completed.
Schedules NotifyTrialistPreTrialJob for (trial.starts_at - 24h) and (trial.starts_at - 1h). Skips scheduling when starts_at is already past the reminder threshold (short-notice trials).

Fires TeamCoachChangedNotification to old + new coach + active members. When event.is_minor_only=true, additionally notifies the branch safeguarding lead + writes a critical-severity audit row. Child-safety notification chain.

When a user hard-deletes (personal erasure), redact their PII fields on any team_members / team_trials row referencing them — preserve the structural fact (team X had a member for period Y) but strip name/email/phone. Same pattern as User module's redaction.

Cascade delete via FK; this listener writes the compliance audit trail entry + emits count metrics (teams purged, team_members purged, team_trials purged, event_teams purged). Financial + anti-discrimination retention still applies to the audit rows, which outlive the source rows.

When a branch pauses, transition every active team in that branch to status='paused' (soft-freeze — existing members survive, new trials + roster adds refused). Reverses on BranchResumed via ThawTeamsInBranch.
Reverses FreezeTeamsInBranch. Only thaws teams that were frozen BY the BranchPaused cascade (checks metadata.frozen_by='branch_pause' to avoid re-activating explicitly-paused teams).
